login.title: Sign in

personalTodo.savedWithReminder: Task saved with due date and reminders

personalTodo.futureDueRequired: Choose a future date/time to enable reminders

settings.languageHint: Changes menu and main headings. Some detail screens may stay partially localized.

leadUpdate.forbidden: You cannot log an update on a lead not assigned to you.
leadUpdate.noteRequired: Write a communication summary before saving.
leadUpdate.title: Lead update
leadUpdate.notePlaceholder: What happened on this call or follow-up? What did the client ask? What's next?

notifications.syncHint: No WebSocket: auto-refresh when returning to the tab or on focus (~every 60s), plus the Refresh button and opening this panel.
notifications.syncFailed: Could not refresh data from server

leads.subtitleHub: All inbound leads from Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, email/Gmail, and Google — start by assigning unassigned leads to reps
leads.subtitleDefault: Search, filter, and update status and assignment directly
leads.subtitleAccountant: Accountant sees owner-approved leads only (moved to financial execution)
leads.subtitleCustomers: External customers only (outside lead pipeline) with debit/credit balances
leads.searchLeads: Search by name, company, or phone
leads.searchCustomers: Search by name, company, source, or phone
leads.selectedCount: Selected: {{count}} — assign & delete apply to all selected leads
leads.selectPageLeads: Select all leads on this page
leads.noResults: No results match the current filters
leads.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete: linked invoices or price quotes exist

leads.deleteConfirmMany: Permanently delete {{count}} leads? This cannot be undone.
leads.deleteBulkBlocked: Cannot delete: leads linked to invoices or quotes

bulkUpload.title: Upload leads from Excel / CSV
bulkUpload.forbidden: Import is available to owner and sales manager only.
bulkUpload.pickFile: Click to choose an Excel or CSV file
bulkUpload.formatHint: Expo / automotive sheet: Client Name, Client number, Client Interested in (one or two columns) — ignores source, Lead From, Date of Phone Call. Or Arabic/English headers: name, mobile, interest.
bulkUpload.noValidRows: No valid rows found in file
bulkUpload.pickValidFirst: Choose a valid Excel or CSV file first
bulkUpload.importForbidden: Import permission: owner or sales manager only
